notes: Teljes vertikalis szelet fejlesztese: React frontend urlap, Flask backend pipeline-ok (standard 4 lepes, style-referenced 3 lepes), WebSocket real-time kommunikacio, Supabase adatbazis es tarolas integralasa.

Pytest teszt suite letrehozasa mock Supabase fixture-okkel: health endpoint, auth endpointok, model unit tesztek, generation API tesztek. MockQueryBuilder implementalas az in-memory Supabase szimulaciohoz.

GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline beallitasa: backend pytest + kodlefedettseg + Codecov feltoltes, frontend TypeScript ellenorzes + Vite build, flake8 linting. Automatikus futtatas push es PR eseten a main agra.
